title: The Work
subtitle: Style Test — Jack Kirby / Fourth World
author: AugmentedMike

panels.caption: 2 AM. The machine never sleeps.
panels.prompt: Jack Kirby Marvel and DC comics art style, 1970s Fourth World era. Explosive primary colors — vivid reds, electric blues, bright yellows, hot pinks. Bold black ink outlines. Kirby dots (fields of tiny circles representing cosmic energy). A figure at a futuristic workstation bathed in vivid cosmic light. The computer is a massive hulking Kirby machine covered in geometric panels and glowing tubes. The city outside crackles with Kirby energy. Dynamic, explosive, joyful. No text, no speech bubbles.

panels.caption: Something's wrong.
panels.prompt: Jack Kirby art style, Fourth World comics. Vivid primary colors, bold ink outlines, Kirby dots. Close-up — hands on a massive futuristic keyboard covered in glowing buttons of every color. Face lit by screen glow — intense, focused, heroic. The expression of a character who KNOWS something is wrong and is about to fix it with cosmic force. Electric blue and red. Explosive background energy. No text.

panels.caption: The logs don't lie. The logic does.
panels.prompt: Jack Kirby cosmic comic art. Vibrant colors — the error is visualized as a Kirby-style energy disruption: crackling red lightning across the screen, a black mass of anti-energy, Kirby dots in dramatic red and black. The figure grabs the problem with both hands like wrestling a cosmic force. Dynamic motion, explosive colors, pure comics energy. No text.

panels.caption: There.
panels.prompt: Kirby-style close-up, vivid colors. The eureka moment rendered as a small yellow starburst — one glowing circuit, one shining point of recognition, surrounded by Kirby dots radiating outward in gold and red. The finger pointing at it crackles with energy. Pure Kirby graphic language: discovery = light. No text.

panels.caption: Fix it. Ship it. Move on.
panels.prompt: Jack Kirby action panel — maximum energy. The figure typing at cosmic speed, hands trailing afterimages in vivid electric blue. The screen blazes with green success. Kirby dots everywhere. Vibrant reds, blues, yellows. Speed lines, explosive background, heroic body language. The energy of a cosmic being solving a universal problem by sheer force of will. No text.

panels.caption: 3:17 AM. Tests pass. The city doesn't know. Doesn't need to.
panels.prompt: Jack Kirby wide cosmic panel. The figure at the desk, the city outside rendered as a glowing Kirby-esque cityscape of geometric towers with windows blazing in electric blues and yellows. The night sky filled with Kirby dots forming a cosmic pattern. The screen glows vivid green. Primary colors everywhere — red, blue, yellow, green. The quiet triumph of finished work rendered in the visual language of cosmic wonder. No text.
